'''gapafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uveomeningitis|uveomeningitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uveomeningitis|uveomeningitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gapafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæpæfæth|gæpæfæth]] || [[word:gæpæfæj|gæpæfæj]] || [[word:gæpæfæsh|gæpæfæsh]] || [[word:gæpæfæ|gæpæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapapafath|gapapafath]] || [[word:gapapafaj|gapapafaj]] || [[word:gapapafash|gapapafash]] || [[word:gapapafa|gapapafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapafath|gapafath]] || [[word:gapafaj|gapafaj]] || [[word:gapafash|gapafash]] || [[word:gapafa|gapafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapaffath|gapaffath]] || [[word:gapaffaj|gapaffaj]] || [[word:gapaffash|gapaffash]] || [[word:gapaffaf|gapaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gapafatha|gapafatha]] || [[word:gapafaja|gapafaja]] || [[word:gapafasha|gapafasha]] || [[word:gapafaka|gapafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gapafath|gapafath]] || [[word:gapafaj|gapafaj]] || [[word:gapafash|gapafash]] || [[word:gapafa|gapafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gapafathal|gapafathal]] || [[word:gapafajal|gapafajal]] || [[word:gapafashal|gapafashal]] || [[word:gapafakal|gapafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gapafathatha|gapafathatha]] || [[word:gapafajaja|gapafajaja]] || [[word:gapafashasha|gapafashasha]] || [[word:gapafaka|gapafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gapafathan|gapafathan]] || [[word:gapafajan|gapafajan]] || [[word:gapafashan|gapafashan]] || [[word:gapafakan|gapafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gapafathaoro|gapafathaoro]] || [[word:gapafajaoro|gapafajaoro]] || [[word:gapafashaoro|gapafashaoro]] || [[word:gapafakaoro|gapafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
